titles.title: New Name Written Down in Glory

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v3 v5 v3 v3 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was lost in shame Could not get past my blame Until He called my name I'm so glad He changed me Darkness held me down But Jesus pulled me out I'm no longer bound I'm so glad He changed me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: See I'm, now a new creation in Christ The old has gone, there's new life I live by faith, not by sight

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is a new name written down in glory And it's mine, yes, it's mine I've met the Author of my story And He's mine, yes, He's mine

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sin had left me blind But Jesus opened my eyes Now I can see the light I'm so glad He changed me Now I'm walking free I've got the victory See it's all over me I'm so glad He changed me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: I am who I am because the I Am tells me who I am I am who I am because the I Am tells me who I am I am who I am because the I Am tells me who I am I am who I am because the I Am tells me who I am :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Jesus is mine Jesus is mine Everywhere I go Everywhere I'll be Oh, Jesus is mine (Jesus is mine)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Yes, He is, yes, He is, yes, He is He's mine Yes, He is Glory to God
